reviews.comment:
Largas colas,poco personal ,falta un compresor para calibrar gomas y el camping está abandonado.Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Long queues, understaffed, lack of a compressor for tire inflation, and the campsite is neglected. Good service.

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza que en plenas vacaciones de invierno no tuvieran naftas. Desalientan toda posibilidad de hacer turismo o paso por la ciudad. En el servishop lo único que tenían para comer era sandwichs de fiambre viejos. Lamentable.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that they didn't have gasoline during the winter holidays. It discourages any possibility of tourism or even just passing through the city. At the gas station, the only thing they had to eat were stale cold cut sandwiches. Dismal.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRaHVtSXRBRRAB
